auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to submit coins and manage your submissions.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to join the CoinArchive contributor program.
auth.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerSuccessMessage: Account created. Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.registerPendingApproval: After verification, your account will show pending approval until an admin approves it.
auth.registerStep1: Open the verification link and confirm your email.
auth.registerStep2: Ask an admin to approve your account.
auth.serverUnreachable: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.verifyMissingInfo: This verification link is missing required information. Please use the link from your email or request a new one.
auth.verifyCheckingMessage: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
auth.verifySuccessMessage: Your account is now awaiting admin approval.
auth.verifyTokenInvalidMessage: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.
auth.verifyFailedMessage: Unable to verify your email. Please try again later.
auth.verifyRequestNewHint: Request a new verification email, or sign in if you already verified your account.
auth.forgotSuccessMessage: If an account exists, a password reset email has been sent.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetInvalidMessage: This password reset link is missing required information. Please request a new reset email.
auth.resetSuccessMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now log in.
auth.resetSubtitle: Set a new password for your account.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.verifyEmail: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.pendingApproval: Your account is verified and awaiting admin approval.
errors.rejected: Your contributor account has been rejected. Contact an administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.signInFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
errors.resendRateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
errors.resendFailed: Could not resend verification email. Please try again.
errors.registerRateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.
errors.emailExists: If this email is already registered, please log in or reset your password.
errors.resetFailed: Unable to reset password. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your coin submissions, drafts, and review progress.
dashboard.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
dashboard.loadFailed: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.noSubmissionsBody: Start your first catalogue entry to see activity here.

drafts.title: Saved drafts
drafts.progressHint: Continue unfinished coins before submitting for review.
drafts.deleteConfirmBody: This local or server draft will be permanently removed.
drafts.deleteDashboardBody: This draft will be permanently removed.

quality.title: Needs attention
quality.subtitle: Fix drafts, revisions, or rejected submissions before they stall.

tips.title: Quick tips
tips.subtitle: Open for reminders before your next submission.
tips.coreBody: Title, country, year, denomination, and coin type help reviewers approve faster.
tips.photosBody: Well-lit obverse and reverse images improve catalogue quality.

stats.approvalPending: Approval rate will appear after your first review decision.

contentLanguage.label: Content language
contentLanguage.helper: Choose the language used for title and descriptions.
contentLanguage.lockedAfterSubmission: Content language cannot be changed after submission. Create a new translation submission for another language.

upload.hintMulti: JPG, PNG, WEBP up to 5MB each

saveFeedback.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again.

wizard.submitSuccess: Coin submitted successfully and is pending review.
wizard.headerDescription: Complete each section to build a catalogue-ready coin submission for archive review.
wizard.editorLoadError: The editor failed to load. Please refresh or reopen this draft.

core-identity.label: Core Identity
core-identity.description: Required details used to identify and classify the coin.
core-identity.tip: Use the official catalogue title and accurate country, year, denomination, and coin type.

images.label: Images
images.description: Obverse, reverse, and optional gallery photographs.
images.tip: Existing images remain unchanged unless you replace or remove them. JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5MB each.

mint-information.label: Mint Information
mint-information.description: Single mint mark or multi-mint variant details.
mint-information.tip: Enable mint variants when the same issue was struck at multiple mints with distinct marks.

specifications.label: Specifications
specifications.tip: Include weight, diameter, and quality when known — these enrich catalogue search and comparison.

descriptions.label: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Optional detailed notes for catalogue and collector context.
descriptions.tip: Describe devices, historical context, and collector notes that help reviewers validate the entry.

status-admin.label: Status & Admin
status-admin.description: Catalogue visibility and record status settings.
status-admin.tip: Published catalogue and featured flags control public visibility after approval.

review-submission.label: Review Submission
review-submission.description: Confirm images, details, and recommended fields before submitting.
review-submission.tip: Check for duplicates and missing catalogue details — you can still go back to edit.

validation.taxonomyOptionsFailed: Options could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
validation.taxonomyInvalidOption: Please select a valid existing option.
validation.taxonomyLanguageMismatch: Please select coin type and denomination again for the selected content language.
validation.taxonomyLanguageMismatchDenomination: Please select the coin value again for the selected content language.
validation.taxonomyLanguageMismatchCoinType: Please select the coin type again for the selected content language.
validation.waitForChecks: Please wait until all checks are complete.
validation.imageType: File must be JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
validation.sourceUrlInvalid: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.
validation.mintVariantsRequired: Add mint marks available or at least one mint variant row with data.

specifications.twoEuroHint: Standard values for 2-Euro coins. Can be adjusted as needed.
specifications.overwriteDescription: Some specification fields already contain values. Replace them with the 2-Euro standard values?

duplicate.exact: This coin already exists in CoinArchive and cannot be submitted again.
duplicate.similar: Similar coins were found. Please review before submitting.
duplicate.waitForCompletion: Please wait until the uniqueness check is complete.
duplicate.unavailableDetail: You can still submit. WordPress will run the final check.
duplicate.draftInfo: You already have an unfinished draft that may be the same coin.

admin.queueSubtitle: Review, filter, and open submissions faster.
admin.noResults: No submissions match this review filter.

adminSeo.subtitle: These metadata fields improve your coin’s discoverability in search engines.
adminSeo.adminOnlyNote: Admin-only. Saves to Yoast SEO meta on WordPress.
adminSeo.phaseNotice: Save SEO to persist Yoast fields. Regenerate overwrites local draft only until saved.
adminSeo.regenerateHint: Overwrite current values with AI draft
adminSeo.saveError: Could not save SEO fields. Please try again.
adminSeo.unsavedChanges: Unsaved SEO changes — save to persist.
adminSeo.applySlugHint: When checked, save also updates post_name from the slug field. Leave unchecked to keep the current URL slug.
adminSeo.seoTitleHint: Recommended max 60 characters for search results.
adminSeo.seoTitleHelper: Keep titles concise and click-worthy for Google results.
adminSeo.metaDescriptionHelper: Summarize the coin clearly for search snippets.
adminSeo.focusKeyphraseHelper: Yoast Free supports only one focus keyphrase.
adminSeo.slugHelper: This will be used as the URL slug in WordPress if applied later.
adminSeo.adminNoteLead: These fields will be mapped to Yoast SEO on WordPress:
adminSeo.previewDescriptionFallback: Meta description preview will appear here.

title.tooLong: Title is longer than recommended for Google.
title.empty: Add an SEO title to preview search results.

meta.tooShort: Description is shorter than the recommended range.
meta.tooLong: Description may be truncated in search results.
meta.empty: Add a meta description for better click-through.

keyphrase.missing: Add a focus keyphrase for Yoast analysis.

slug.needsCleanup: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
slug.empty: Optional, but a slug helps preview the final URL.

tips.title: A good title attracts clicks and improves rankings.
tips.meta: Write unique meta descriptions for each coin.
tips.keyphrase: Use your keyphrase naturally in title and description.
tips.slug: Short, clean URLs are easier to rank.

form.coreIdentityDescription: Required details used to identify and classify the coin.
form.loadingCoinFormDataHint: Please wait while country, coin type, denomination, and series options are prepared.
form.coinCodeHint: Coin code is generated by WordPress on submit. The suffix shown here is preview only.
form.sourcesDescription: Optional official reference for this coin issue.
form.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief summary of the coin and its significance...
form.imagesDescriptionNew: Obverse and reverse are optional when WordPress defaults are configured. Gallery photos are optional.
form.imagesDescriptionEdit: Replace or remove existing images, or add new gallery photos.
form.existingImagesHint: Existing images remain unchanged unless you replace or remove them.
form.specificationsDescription: Release date is required. Other physical and production details are optional.
form.releaseDateHint: Accepts YYYY-MM-DD, DD.MM.YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, or YYYYMMDD.
form.edgeInscriptionPlaceholder: e.g. EINIGKEIT UND RECHT UND FREIHEIT
form.reviewCoreIdentitySubtitle: Required classification fields from the identity step
form.descriptionsDescription: Optional detailed notes for catalogue and collector context.
form.historicalBackgroundHint: You can add formatted historical notes. Basic HTML is supported.
form.historicalBackgroundPlaceholder: Historical context, issuing authority, or catalogue background

series.title: Choosing a Series
series.intro: Use the series that best matches the main topic of the coin.
series.footer: Choose the category that best describes the coin's primary theme.

ai.title: AI Writing Assistant
ai.subtitle: Generate professional coin descriptions based on the coin information entered so far.
ai.requiredFieldsHint: Add country, year, denomination, and coin type before generating descriptions.
ai.regenerateConfirm: Regenerating will replace current AI-generated content.

errors.rateLimited: AI generation limit reached. Try again later.
errors.notConfigured: AI provider is not configured yet.
errors.invalidResponse: AI provider returned an invalid response.
errors.germanLanguageMismatch: Der KI-Text wirkt nicht deutsch. Bitte erneut generieren.

mint.description: Optional mint mark details for single-mark coins or multi-mint variants.

mint.marksAvailablePlaceholder: e.g. A, D, F, G, J
mint.emptyVariants: No individual mint variants added yet.

mint.multipleEmpty: Multiple mint mode enabled — {{empty}} for variant rows

review.finalAuditTitle: Final audit — review every field collected across the wizard before submitting.

review.titleCleanupHint: Inputs are automatically cleaned for spacing and consistency before submission.
